hook: Turn Codex into a concert-stage workspace around an original cyber idol vibe.
positioning: fan-light energy, premium concert glass, soft pink-violet spotlights, collectible backstage pass UI

requiredShape.marketplacePreview: 16:9 horizontal Codex-like full workspace + right-side emotional hero/world art + themed sidebar/main/composer + skin chip + Remix / Customize CTA
requiredShape.liveLayout: right 42% idol/stage art zone; left sidebar frosted high-contrast; composer stage-glow accent with stable text

generationPrompts.marketplacePreview: Marketplace preview for Idol Stage Skin: horizontal 16:9 benchmark-style Codex Desktop skin preview, Codex-like desktop window occupies 52-72% left/center, visible app chrome/sidebar/main workspace/AI side panel/task cards/bottom composer, right-side emotional art zone: Right 42% reserved for an original faceless cyber-idol silhouette on a round concert platform, light sticks, fan-card shapes, no celebrity likeness. Category chip and Remix / Customize CTA visible. Palette canvas #FFF5FB, panelSoft #F8E8F3, panelWhite #FFFFFF, textPrimary #251326, mutedText #735C72, accent #E83E8C, accentAlt #7C3AED, glow #FFD2EA, border #E8CFE0, heroInk #3A1736. Premium PC workspace product, not a poster, not a wallpaper, not plain color. IP safety negative prompt: no real celebrity face or name, no agency logo, no concert poster copy, no copied outfit, no watermark, no competitor screenshot.
generationPrompts.liveBackground: Live background for Idol Stage Skin: UI-free low-detail atmospheric background only, right 42% emotional hero/world art, calm left/sidebar and bottom composer safe zones for readability scrims. Decompose into background + optional hero/ornament layer + surface/accent tokens. No baked text, no logos, no real person/team/franchise marks. Mood: fan-light energy, premium concert glass, soft pink-violet spotlights, collectible backstage pass UI. Negative prompt: no real celebrity face or name, no agency logo, no concert poster copy, no copied outfit, no watermark, no competitor screenshot.

ipSafetyNotes.publicSafeVersion: Right 42% reserved for an original faceless cyber-idol silhouette on a round concert platform, light sticks, fan-card shapes, no celebrity likeness.
ipSafetyNotes.bannedSubjectMatter: no real celebrity face or name, no agency logo, no concert poster copy, no copied outfit, no watermark, no competitor screenshot
ipSafetyNotes.rightsNotes: Original programmatic vector-style composition generated locally with Playwright/CSS. No third-party artwork, real celebrities, anime/game characters, team crests, FIFA/World Cup marks, player likenesses, logos, competitor images, or external assets used.
ipSafetyNotes.builderCopyReminder: Use images you own or have rights to. Do not redistribute copyrighted celebrity, anime, sports team, or player artwork without permission.

qaNotes: Owner-review concept batch only; no real Codex Desktop apply per brief.
Crops are simulated Codex overlay crops, not CDP evidence.
If selected, next step is decompose into .dreamskin/manual kit and run real Install/Apply/Verify/Restore.
